## Summary

Describe the user-visible change and why it is needed.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Relevant plugin, layout, and package checks
- [ ] No credentials, private hostnames, personal media, or runtime data are included

## Security impact

Describe changes to authentication boundaries, credentials, uploads, network requests, plugins, or process permissions. Write “None” when not applicable.
